title: ISRO is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ISRO is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About ISRO:
ISRO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO!
